hero.subtitle: Build a page, pick your slug, pay one dollar. No subscriptions, no setup, no technical knowledge needed.

pickSlug.title: Pick your slug
pickSlug.desc: Choose a unique URL that represents you. Your name, your brand, your studio — whatever fits.

buildPage.title: Build your page
buildPage.desc: Add your headline, description, and a call-to-action. Everything looks great out of the box.

goLive.title: Pay $1, go live
goLive.desc: One dollar. Your page is live forever. Share anywhere — Instagram, business card, email.

instantPublishing.title: Instant publishing
instantPublishing.desc: From idea to live page in under a minute. No setup, no config, no waiting.

memorableUrl.title: Memorable URL
memorableUrl.desc: A clean link at slugpage.com/yourname. Easy to remember, easy to share.

editAnytime.title: Edit anytime, free
editAnytime.desc: The $1 is a one-time publish fee — all edits after that are always free.

mobileReady.title: Mobile ready
mobileReady.desc: Every page looks great on any device. Your visitors get a perfect experience everywhere.
